data.current_description: Creates a new webhook subscription for a specific event type.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new webhook subscription for Tolstoy events. Requires a webhook URL and event type in the request body (see WebhookCreateRequest schema). Returns the created webhook object with a unique webhookId and configuration details. The webhook will immediately begin receiving events matching the specified type.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks critical details about inputs (URL and event type requirements), outputs (returns webhook object with ID), and side effects (webhook becomes active immediately). Enhanced description specifies request schema reference, return value structure, and activation behavior for better AI agent understanding.
